meta.title: Aleksander Kowalski — Software Developer
meta.description: Software developer focused on embedded automation, backend systems and frontend engineering. Based in Kraków, Poland.

hero.title: Software Developer
hero.description: I build reliable systems end to end — from PLC-connected automation software to backend APIs and the interfaces on top. I care about code that still makes sense in a year.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.subheading: Three stops, one thread: making software that talks to the real world.

embedded-automation.description: Write control and monitoring software for industrial automation lines, integrating PLCs over Modbus TCP with a Python/C++ service layer. Own the CI/CD pipeline that ships firmware-adjacent updates without downtime on the shop floor.

freelance-web.description: Delivered full-stack websites and internal tools for small businesses, from WordPress builds to custom PHP/MySQL backends. Handled everything from client scoping to server deployment and Nginx configuration.

frontend-developer.description: Built and maintained React interfaces for a product studio, translating Figma designs into accessible, tested components. Introduced a shared component library that cut new-feature build time noticeably.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.subheading: Tools I reach for, grouped by where they live in the stack.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: Open to new roles and interesting problems.

footer.text: Built with plain HTML, CSS & JavaScript — no framework, no build step.
